lede: A look at June 7 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Emperor Jingzong of Western Xia and Prince (musician), and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Israeli Air Force
events.desc: The Israeli Air Force destroys Iraq's Osiraq nuclear reactor during Operation Opera.

events.title: Supreme Court of the United States
events.desc: The Supreme Court of the United States hands down its decision in Griswold v. Connecticut, prohibiting the states from criminalizing the use of contraception by married couples.

events.title: 1948 anti-Jewish riots in Oujda and Jerada
events.desc: Anti-Jewish riots in Oujda and Jerada take place.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: Battle of Messines: Allied soldiers detonate a series of mines underneath German trenches at Messines Ridge, killing 10,000 German troops.

events.title: Temperance movement in the United States
events.desc: American Temperance crusader Carrie Nation begins her campaign of vandalizing alcohol-serving establishments by destroying the inventory in a saloon in Kiowa, Kansas.

events.title: Homer Plessy
events.desc: Homer Plessy is arrested for refusing to leave his seat in the "whites-only" car of a train; he lost the resulting court case, Plessy v. Ferguson.

events.title: Reform Act 1832
events.desc: The Great Reform Act of England and Wales receives royal assent.

events.title: Petition of Right
events.desc: The Petition of Right, a major English constitutional document, is granted royal assent by Charles I and becomes law.

events.title: Pope John VIII
events.desc: Pope John VIII recognises the Duchy of Croatia under Duke Branimir as an independent state.

events.title: Theodosius II
events.desc: Emperor Theodosius II marries Aelia Eudocia at Constantinople (Byzantine Empire).

births.name: Emperor Jingzong of Western Xia
births.line: Emperor of Western Xia from 1038 to 1048

births.name: Prince (musician)
births.line: American singer-songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and actor

births.name: Mike Pence
births.line: 48th Vice President of the United States, 50th Governor of Indiana

deaths.text: William Anders, American astronaut and lunar explorer
Alan Turing, English mathematician and computer scientist
Joseph von Fraunhofer, German optician, physicist, and astronomer
Alexander Spotswood, Moroccan-American colonial and politician, Lieutenant Governor of Virginia

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Anne of Saint Bartholomew
Christian feast day: Paul I of Constantinople
